case_title: SOU KUN MAK LAO VS. GARMENT NETWORK INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AKA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAO, SOU KUN MAK AS TO DEFENDANT GARMENT NETWORK INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AKA G.N.T. INC. AND TEAMSHOP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
